title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 246.100 - Tax anticipation warrants, contents
text:
246.100.  Tax anticipation warrants, contents. — The board shall issue the tax anticipation warrants as authorized by order of the board, setting out the amounts, denomination, numbers, interest rate, the proceedings authorizing its action and embodying therein the amounts falling due each year, together with interest thereon.
(RSMo 1939 § 12616) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 11027
